**рқҳҝрқҷҖрқҷҲрқҷҠ рқҷҸрқҷҖрқҷҺрқҷҸ рқҳҪрқҷҠрқҷҸ вһЈ [ бҙ„КңЙӘбҙӢбҙҸбҙҸ вңҳ бҙҚбҙңsЙӘбҙ„ [ рқҗҚбҙҸ рқҗҖбҙ…s ] рҹҘҖ ](https://t.me/ChikooMusic_bot)**



<img src="https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?color=FF0000&width=420&lines=вҡ пёҸрқ—ҷрқ—ўрқ—Ҙрқ—һ+рқ—–рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—һрқ—ўрқ—ў+рқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Јрқ—ў+рқ—•рқ—ҳрқ—ҷрқ—ўрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳ+рқ——рқ—ҳрқ—Јрқ—ҹрқ—ўрқ—¬вҡ пёҸ">


Chikoo Music lets you stream high-quality and low-latency audio and video playback into telegram group video chats.<br>
Built with Python, Pyrogram, and Py-TgCalls, itвҖҷs optimized for reliability and easy deployment on Heroku, VPS, or Docker.
</div>

<hr>

<h2>рҹ”Ҙ Features</h2>

- рҹҺ§ Stream low-latency audio in real time to <b>Telegram group video chats</b>
- рҹҢҗ Supports multiple platforms like <b>YouTube, Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud</b>
- вҡЎ Advanced queue management with auto-play
- вҡҷпёҸ Easy deployment вҖ” works on Local, VPS, or Heroku
- вқӨпёҸ Built with Python
<hr>

    в”ҖгҖҢ бҙ…бҙҮбҙ©КҹбҙҸКҸ бҙҸЙҙ КҹбҙҸбҙ„бҙҖКҹ КңбҙҸsбҙӣ/ бҙ бҙҳs гҖҚв”Җ
</h3>

### рҹ”§ Quick Setup

1. **Upgrade & Update:**
   ```bash
   sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get upgrade -y
   ```

2. **Install Required Packages:**
   ```bash
   sudo apt-get install python3-pip ffmpeg -y
   ```
3. **Setting up PIP**
   ```bash
   sudo pip3 install -U pip
   ```
4. **Installing Node**
   ```bash
   curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.38.0/install.sh | bash && source ~/.bashrc && nvm install v18
   ```
5. **Clone the Repository**
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/noxarix/ChikooXmusic && cd ChikooXmusic
   ```
6. **Install Requirements**
   ```bash
   pip3 install -U -r requirements.txt
   ```
7. **Installing tmux**
    ```bash
    sudo apt install tmux -y && tmux
   ```
8. **Editing Vars:**
   ```bash
   bash setup
   ```
9. **Run the Bot**
    ```bash
    bash start
    ```
